_comment: Authoritative RBAC policy for the Enterprise RAG platform. Access is granted only when ALL conditions hold: (1) the document department is in the role's allowed departments (or the role is a wildcard), (2) the document sensitivity is at or below the role's clearance, and (3) if a document declares explicit allowed_roles, the user's role is listed (Admin bypasses this). Compliance has cross-department READ access for audit purposes, mirroring a real enterprise GRC function.

Admin.description: Platform administrator with full cross-department, all-sensitivity access.

HR.description: Human Resources. Owns employee, leave, hiring and handbook content.

Finance.description: Finance department. Budgets, forecasts and expense reporting.

Engineering.description: Engineering owns platform/architecture docs and operational datasets.

Compliance.description: Governance, Risk & Compliance. Cross-department read access for audit, but cannot exceed restricted clearance.
